name: jobpilot-platform
description: A comprehensive on-demand home service booking platform with MERN stack.

scripts.start: cd backend && npm install && npm start
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install --include=dev && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.install-all: cd frontend && npm install --include=dev && cd ../backend && npm install

author: Sarvesh Chaudhary
